command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo '=EXEC_WC='
wc -l runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py runtime/phase_implementation_staging.py
echo '=EXISTING_TESTS='
python3 -m pytest tests/ --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -60
echo '=RUN_EXISTING_TESTS='
python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -30
ENDSSH
